title: palisota repens
intro: Palisota repens, also known as the creeping palisota, is a type of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as being used to reduce menstrual cramps and improve digestion. Palisota repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and as a topical application for skin conditions.
